commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: For it is said there is great and exceeding joy and festival in the heavens with the Father and the angels when one sinner turns and repents.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Before the angels. By this it is plain that the spirits in heaven have a concern for us below, and a joy at our repentance, and consequently a knowledge of it. (Challoner)
